chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-756 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.10.2021 Mr. Gulzar Ali Almani advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh and Mr. Fayaz Hussain Sabki, APG along with SIP Dileejan Rind on behalf of SHO PS Qasimabad. -.-.-. Mr. Ashfaque Ali Khaskheli advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.6, 7 & 8 and undertakes that no harassment would be caused to petitioner. SIP Dileejan Rind on behalf of SHO PS Qasimabad also undertakes that protection to the petitioner in accordance with law would be provided. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
